name: ui-hud-pack
description: HUD, icons, menus, and buttons for a game UI pass.

defaults.style: readable game UI pixel art, crisp outline, compact NES/SNES-inspired controls, no antialiasing
defaults.palette: dark navy, clear blue, warm cream, brick red, gold highlight

qa: Inspect all UI at target scale for legibility.
Keep text out of generated art unless the user explicitly wants baked labels.
Prefer icon-only assets for runtime-localized UI.

assets.prompt: gameplay HUD strip for {{brief}}, hearts, coin counter, magic meter, compact top-left layout, transparent background, {{style}}, {{palette}}
transparent 4x4 inventory icon sheet for {{brief}}: coin, key, map, potion, wand, boot, gem, leaf, heart, shield, medal, star, {{style}}, {{palette}}
blank pause menu panel, carved corner trim, no text, transparent outer background, readable inner panel, {{style}}, {{palette}}
blank pixel UI button state sheet, normal hover pressed disabled, no text, compact game menu style, {{style}}, {{palette}}
